positive: A minimalist, abstract celestial map design centered around a stylized crescent moon and a cluster of geometric constellations. The palette should be deep indigo, dusty gold, matte black, and pearlescent silver. The composition must feature clean, strong silhouettes of the cosmic elements, overlaid with fine, delicate line art representing zodiac patterns. Integrate subtle, glowing energy lines emanating from the stars, giving the overall feel of elegant, high-contrast cosmic exploration. The style should be a sophisticated blend of modern geometric etching and celestial cartography, suitable for a single-color screen print or direct-to-garment application. High contrast, central symmetry, highly detailed, vector-art feel, clean edges, rule of thirds applied to the negative space.
negative: blurry, noise, lowres, artifact, watermark, signature, text, bad anatomy, malformed, extra limbs, dirty, messy, low contrast, photo-realistic, 3d render, graffiti
